macro.title: Cost headwinds batter affordable housing developers, report finds
macro.what: LISC says insurance, utilities and inflation are squeezing affordable housing, as 374,497 units near expiry and starts drop in 2026.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Rocket Companies upsizes bond deal to $1.5 billion
macro.what: Rocket Companies has priced the issuance of $1.5 billion in senior notes in an oversubscribed transaction, with proceeds to refinance an existing term loan.
macro.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
macro.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

macro.title: May inflation climbs to 4.2%, Fed likely stays on hold
macro.what: BLS said May CPI rose 4.2% y/y and 0.5% m/m, with energy driving most of the gain, as core inflation rose 2.9% y/y and 0.2% m/m.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: New York listings bill calls Compass’s bluff
housing.what: New York Assembly passed a listings bill May 29, requiring concurrent public marketing or a signed opt out, with fines up to $5,000.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: CoStar targets Zillow Preview in amicus filing over MRED feed

housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
